description: Composition Black dress made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, a round neck, ballet wrap layer on the front with flaring pin-tucks on the right shoulder and a removable belt Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold Mild detergent only Dry in shade Do not bleach jealous 21 have come up with this form fitting dress with innovative design details, crafted to make you stand out from the crowd. Style this with a glitzy party clutch, pointy toed pumps and you're good to go! For a less glam occasion, wear this with tights and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
